---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Type '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or console output.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 131, Safari 18, Firefox 133)
- **Using:** (Web / CLI / MCP)
- **NL2Shell version / commit:** (e.g. `v0.2.1` or commit hash)

## Screenshots

If applicable, attach screenshots or a screen recording.

## Additional Context

Anything else that might be relevant — specific shell commands that failed, model output you received, etc.
